title: Journal Pre-proof
abstract: This paper examines how local government interventions relate to the formation and upgrading of agro-based clusters (ACs) using the ginger industry in China as a case study. We employ a comparative, multi- county, multi-decade framework that integrates administrative records, county gazetteers, remote sensing imagery, and business registration data. A key innovation of our study is the use of a metrics-based stage classification system to assess the development of four case counties that, despit...
